HEARING RE: PLAINTIFF LAUREN GOLDBOSS's Motion For Dismissal Order.

The Court's tentative ruling instructed parties to appear.

No appearances made by/for any parties.

There being no appearances made by/for any parties, the Court orders this matter off calendar.

Atty. SHANNON GUEVARA, Esq. of B / B Law Group LLP (Tel: 323-925-7800) now present for plaintiff Lauren Goldboss (via Zoom videoconference).

The Court notes no one is present to oppose the dismissal.

The Court rules as follows: Plaintiff's motion for dismissal order is granted.

The prevailing party is to prepare and submit a proposed order to the Court.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer Jr.; Clerk: Sean Kane; Not Reported. (302/RBU)
